nodes.label: Tests that validate that hyper-h2 correctly handles informational (1XX) response
When receiving a informational response, the appropriate event is         signal
At least three header blocks can be received: informational, headers,         tr
More than one informational response is allowed.
Receiving provisional responses with END_STREAM set causes         ProtocolError
When receiving a informational response after the actual response         header
When sending a informational response, the appropriate frames are         emitte
At least three header blocks can be sent: informational, headers,         traile
More than one informational response is allowed.
Sending provisional responses with END_STREAM set causes         ProtocolErrors.
When sending an informational response after the actual response         headers
